name: Horned Devil (Malebranche)
damage_resistances: Bludgeoning, Piercing, and Slashing damage that isn't Silvered

traits.name: Devil's Sight
traits.description: Magical darkness doesn't impede the devil's darkvision.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.description: The devil has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The devil makes three attacks: two with its Fork and one with its Tail, or it makes three Hurl Flame attacks.

actions.name: Fork
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +10, reach 10 ft. Hit: 15 (2d8 + 6) Piercing damage.

actions.name: Tail
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +10, reach 10 ft. Hit: 10 (1d8 + 6) Piercing damage. If the target is a creature other than an Undead or a Construct, it must make a DC 17 Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, it takes 10 (3d6) Poison damage and has the Poisoned condition until the end of its next turn. On a successful save, the creature takes half as much damage and isn't Poisoned.

actions.name: Hurl Flame
actions.description: Ranged Attack Roll: +7, range 150 ft. Hit: 14 (2d10 + 3) Fire damage. If the target is a flammable object that isn't being worn or carried, it also catches fire.

tactical_info.environment: Nine Hells, infernal battlefields, planar convergence zones
tactical_info.tactics: Uses multiattack with fork and poison tail, flies to control positioning, hurls flames at range, focuses on overwhelming single targets
tactical_info.weaknesses: Vulnerable to silvered weapons, relies on positioning for effectiveness, limited ranged options beyond flame
